global.description: The ad features a combination of text and graphic elements promoting travel deals.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element with an abstract shape, possibly a placeholder for an image or logo.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold body text that reads 'destinations await Special fares today €9.99 Try for free', prominently displayed at the bottom.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo of 'NomadLayer' displayed at the top in a clear, bold font.

elements.label: Catchy headline
elements.description: A catchy headline that says 'Dream', positioned centrally and styled to attract attention.
